title: Kiro Specs: From Prompt to Production
summary: Kiro is a tool that converts a single AI prompt into clear requirements, system design, and discrete tasks to keep AI-assisted codebases organized and shippable. It addresses the problem of codebases spiraling out of control during AI-driven development.
